title: Shy's Performance Modpack
description: A performance focused modpack with some of my favorite QOL features/mods
body:
**  **

![Modpack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce284c5e4f19116f7f5bc2b7d4fd3c2a9e1fdbf1.png)
**  **

SPM is a lightweight performance focused modpack with some quality-of-life mods and bug fixes that tries to maintain the vanilla experience.

**  **

## Extra Mods

Mods that i also recommend but are not in the pack:

1. [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) - Performance improvements (for NVIDIA graphics cards)
2. [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - Adds shader support
3. [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - Adds dynamic lighting
4. [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - Adds support for custom entity models and textures
5. [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) - Adds support for custom item textures
6. [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - Adds connected textures
7. [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod) - Allows you to record, replay and share your gameplay
8. [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) - Adds voice chat (must be installed on the server as well)
9. [LAN World Plug-n-Play](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcwifipnp) - Adds the ability to open LAN servers for people outside of your network
10. [Freecam](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam) - Adds a customizeable freecam (banned on most servers)
